Home Entities Trump, Donald

Trump, Donald

Leader

United States

Objectives

Stated

  • 2026-04-10 "Iranians only alive to negotiate," have no cards beyond "short-term extortion" with Hormuz — Source: Brief-2215 (Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, BBC, SCMP, The Hindu)
  • [2026-04-10 23:45] Hormuz must open "fairly soon" — Source: Al Jazeera, Reuters, SCMP
  • 2026-04-11 Warns "no back-up plan" if Islamabad talks fail — "The only reason they are alive today is to negotiate" — Source: BBC, Reuters, RT

Revealed

  • [2026-04-10 23:45] Reuters exclusive reports Trump considers pulling US troops from Europe amid NATO strains — contradicts NATO commitment rhetoric. Source: Reuters
  • 2026-04-11 Reportedly unleashed "tirade of insults" at NATO chief Mark Rutte over allies' refusal to join Iran war — Politico — Source: RT, The Hindu

Inferred

  • (No entries yet)

Claims & Track Record

  • [2026-04-10] Claimed: "Iranians only alive to negotiate," Hormuz blockade is "short-term extortion." Outcome: pending. Source: Truth Social, SCMP
  • [2026-04-11] Claimed: "no back-up plan" if Islamabad talks fail. Outcome: pending. Source: BBC, Reuters, RT
  • [2026-04-12] Trump announces full naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after Islamabad talks collapsed without agreement; says Iran has "no cards left" — Sources: SCMP, Al Jazeera, BBC, The Hindu, Middle East Eye, TASS, RT (brief-164700.md) — pending
  • [2026-04-12] Trump threatens "staggering" tariffs on China if it aids Tehran — Sources: Multiple feeds (brief-175200.md) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] Trump: US forces "clearing" Hormuz; empty ships "rushing to the US to load up" — Source: Truth Social
  • [2026-04-13] Trump: "I don't care if Iran returns to negotiations," stating Iran is "desperate" and "in very bad shape." — Sources: Multiple feeds — pending
  • [2026-04-13] Trump attacks Pope Leo as "weak on crime, terrible for foreign policy" — Sources: SCMP (China-aligned), Reuters (Western), BBC (Western), The Hindu (India) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] WSJ reports Trump administration considering limited strikes on Iran after Islamabad talks collapse — Sources: WSJ via Multiple feeds — pending
  • [2026-04-13] DOJ will "vigorously prosecute anyone who buys or sells sanctioned Iranian oil" — Trump administration enforcement action — Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] UK PM Starmer explicitly states UK "will not back blockade of Strait of Hormuz" — marking divergence from US position — Sources: Reuters (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] US naval blockade of Iranian ports takes effect 14:00 GMT April 13; vessels transiting to/from non-Iranian ports permitted — Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] Trump calls Pope Leo "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy"; Pope says he will "speak out loudly" against Iran war — Sources: BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned) — pending
  • [2026-04-13] Trump continued attacks from the tarmac while returning from Florida, calling himself "not a fan" of the Pope — Sources: BBC (Western)
  • [2026-04-13] Trump threatens to "sink" Iranian boats that challenge Hormuz blockade — Sources: The Hindu (India), BBC (Western)

Divergences

  • [2026-04-10] Stated: NATO alliance is strong (Vance endorsement of Orbán). Revealed: Weighs pulling troops from Europe, questions NATO commitments. Confidence: HIGH.
